name: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #19
description: Florentine Groteschi #19 is a meme macro primary single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Forum Signature Baroque. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Ruota della Fortuna, used here as the witness card. A patron contract folded into a prayer card gets pulled into a QR-code audio guide whispering private keys, making the panel read like a corrupted receipt for belief, status, and patronage. The fresco keeps receipts better than the family does. The generated insert, a pop-up ad promising immortality for 0.08 ETH, acts as the modern clue; Gematria marks RELIC at Σ 282.

attributes.value: a pop-up ad promising immortality for 0.08 ETH

chess_piece.name: Rook

rarity.ranking_rule: Higher chess strength/rank is intentionally rarer: Pawn common, Knight/Bishop uncommon, Rook rare, Queen epic, King legendary.

board_position.position_rule: Deterministic per-token board square reserved for future game/use mechanics; independent of visible glyph placement.

chess_piece.allocation_rule: Weighted deterministic shuffled chess allocation by piece strength: {'Pawn': 560, 'Knight': 280, 'Bishop': 280, 'Rook': 168, 'Queen': 84, 'King': 29}
chess_piece.metadata_visibility: Hidden from OpenSea attributes; stored only in florentine_groteschi.hidden_traits.
chess_piece.visual_rule: A small unlabeled foreground chess glyph shows the chess-piece graphic with the piece name encoded underneath; that visible code is intentionally not serialized in metadata.

visible_text.title: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #19
visible_text.main_caption: Renaissance math enters the mempool and starts correcting posture. Botticelli is not random dressing here: every small note sounds like someone was trying to hide the same problem, so the fresco keeps receipts better than the family does.
visible_text.history_now_bridge: BAPTISTERY FLOOR THREAD: a patron contract folded into a prayer card gets pulled into a QR-code audio guide whispering private keys. Ruota della Fortuna reads the jump as patronage theater: who certifies the relic, who pays for belief, and who gets the receipt. The fresco keeps receipts better than the family does.
visible_text.period_looksmaxx_plaque: BOTTICELLI VENUSMAXX MIRROR NOTE: arrange curls like controlled fire while the frame maker blinks. The Bacon ribbon hides all negative aura, kept short for plaque survival.
visible_text.qr_payload_if_drawn: QR WITNESS #19: Ruota della Fortuna names Botticelli; the fresco keeps receipts better than the family does.
bottom_provenance_strip: MINCHIATE 97×14+43 // RUOTA DELLA FORTUNA // PAL meme macro primary // GEMATRIA ARC

artwork_breakdown.generated_insert: a pop-up ad promising immortality for 0.08 ETH

tarocchi_fiorentini.allocation_rule: 14 complete 97-card sets across 1,401 tokens, plus 43 deterministic extras

artwork_breakdown.composition_read: Botticelli anchors the historical source. Ruota della Fortuna supplies the witness logic. The pop-up ad promising immortality for 0.08 ETH acts as the modern meme-object. The meme macro primary palette and Forum Signature Baroque styling make the panel read like a corrupted Renaissance case file.

groteschi_explanation.plain_english: Read plainly: Botticelli is treated as evidence in a baptistery floor thread. The old-world clue is a patron contract folded into a prayer card; the modern-world echo is a QR-code audio guide whispering private keys. The joke is that patronage, holy paperwork, and marketplace verification are all status systems asking who gets believed.
groteschi_explanation.read_between_the_lines: The Ruota della Fortuna card is not decorative; it tells you how to read the room. The old clue and the modern clue compete as evidence, so the panel becomes a custody argument about belief, status, and receipts. The fresco keeps receipts better than the family does. The slang turns sacred authority into aura, patronage into clout economics, and marginalia into groupchat evidence.

slang_for_normal_plebs.translation_for_normal_plebs: did it perfectly; in this collection a fresco, saint, or relic can 'eat' like a viral post

hidden_solution.method: Split the visible marker into DNA triplets, translate each triplet through the genetic-code table, then read the amino-acid letters as the source Base name. Non-standard letters use documented stop/nearest triplet placeholders.

hidden_acrostic.method: Read the first character of each acrostic line; slashes are spaces.
